events.title: Babytime (0 -18 months)
events.description: Babies and their caregivers will enjoy this storytime activity featuring books, songs, rhymes, and playful activities–plus some time to socialize. We’ll gather in the Youth Services Program Space (2nd floor). Available times for ages 0 - 18 months are: 9:30 a.m. and 2:00 p.m. on Wednesdays and Thursdays

events.title: Leander Liberty Fest 2026 – Free July 3rd Drone Show & Fireworks at Devine Lake Park
events.description: Leander's largest annual event, Liberty Fest, returns free to Devine Lake Park on Friday, July 3 with live music, children's activities, and food. This America 250 edition adds a 300-drone show paired with the city's traditional fireworks display at 9:30 p.m.

events.title: Teen Murder Mystery: After Hours
events.description: This event is in the "Teens" group Teen Murder Mystery: After Hours Friday, July 3, 2026 at 6:00pm - 8:00pm Program Type: Other Age Group: Teens Register Now

events.title: Lakeway July 4th Parade 2026 – America 250 Salute to America
events.description: Lakeway's beloved Fourth of July Parade returns with an America 250 'Salute to America' theme, rolling down Lakeway Drive at 8:30 a.m. Stick around for the family-friendly Hot Dog Reception at the Lakeway Activity Center at 10 a.m.
events.venue: Lakeway Drive to Lakeway Activity Center, 105 Cross Creek

events.title: Round Rock July 4th Parade 2026 – Free Downtown Independence Day Celebration
events.description: Kick off the Fourth of July in Round Rock with the free Sertoma Independence Day Parade marching down Mays Street. Line the route early to beat the heat and cheer on floats, bands, and patriotic fun the whole family will love.
events.venue: Mays Street (Mays Crossing to Sunset Drive)

events.title: Georgetown 4th of July 2026 Family Celebration & Fireworks at San Gabriel Park
events.description: Georgetown's free 4th of July Family Celebration packs San Gabriel Park with a kiddie parade, live entertainment, food, and rides all day long. The festivities end with a big Independence Day fireworks display at 9:30 p.m.
events.venue: San Gabriel Park, 445 E. Morrow St.

events.title: Round Rock Frontier Days 2026 at Old Settlers Park – July 4th Festival & Fireworks
events.description: Round Rock's free Frontier Days festival fills Old Settlers Park with live music, family activities, and food on the Fourth of July. The all-ages celebration wraps up after dark with a dazzling Independence Day fireworks show.
events.venue: Old Settlers Park (Lakeview Stage and Pavilion), 1501 Harrell Pkwy

events.title: Red, White & Buda 2026 – July 4th Bike Parade, Live Music & Fireworks
events.description: Red, White & Buda celebrates the Fourth of July with a morning Bike Parade down Main Street, then an afternoon of bounce houses, a splashpad, vendors, and live music at the Buda Amphitheater. The free family festival closes with a big fireworks show at 9:15 p.m.

events.title: Austin Symphony Orchestra July 4th Concert and Fireworks presented by H-E-B
events.description: Austin's largest Independence Day celebration: patriotic music by the Austin Symphony Orchestra at Vic Mathias (Auditorium) Shores with a fireworks finale over Lady Bird Lake. Gates open 4:30PM; the majority of the grounds is free and open to the public.
events.sourceName: Austin Symphony Orchestra July 4th Concert and Fireworks (H-E-B)

events.title: Cedar Park Cedar Sparktacular 2026 – Free July 4th Festival & Fireworks at Milburn Park
events.description: Cedar Park's free Cedar Sparktacular brings carnival rides, games, live music, and a sensory-friendly retreat to Milburn Park on the Fourth of July. The night ends with the city's biggest fireworks show at 9:30 p.m., followed by a screening of Despicable Me 4.

events.title: Morning Glow: Garden Yoga Sundays with Jené
events.description: @ Awaken your senses and cultivate clarity for the week ahead with an invigorating morning practice nestled in the natural beauty of Zilker Botanical Garden! events.title: Chess Academy: Open Play
events.description: The Round Rock Public Library Chess Academy meets on Sunday afternoons from 1:30 to 4:30 p.m. Our aim is to make this incredible game more accessible for everyone. events.title: Genealogy Coach
events.description: Need advice on where to find that elusive record or data? Visit the Reference Desk, Third Floor, from 2 to 4 p.m., on Sundays, for a one-on-one session with Genealogy Coach Mandy Cerrillo. Family history researchers now have the opportunity to receive assistance, one-on-one, from someone with years of experience. To reserve your one-hour slot, Register Here

events.title: Youth Open Chess Play
events.description: Are you looking to play chess with other youth? Stop by the second-floor Youth Services Program Space and build your chess skills by playing with others. Some chess sets will be provided. Feel free to bring your own chess set. Recommended for ages 6 and up with a caregiver. This is a come-and-go event.

events.description: @ Transition seamlessly from the busy work week into a restful weekend with a soothing evening practice at Zilker Botanical Garden. events.title: Library on the Go at Frontier Park
events.description: Our pop-up library service, Library on the Go , is intended to reach people in our community who may not have easy access to the library over the summer. We hope to encourage reading and literacy, connect with the community, and provide library services in a fun and engaging way. events.title: Bug Walk with Wizzie Brown
events.description: @ Join Wizzie Brown ( @UrbanIPM ) for a guided Bug Walk through Zilker Botanical Garden ! Wizzie, Senior Extension Program Specialist with Texas A&M AgriLife Extension, will introduce you to urban & landscape pests, vegetable garden pests, and native pollinators—sharing ID tips, safe management practices, and fun facts. events.title: Chess Academy: Open Play
events.description: The Round Rock Public Library Chess Academy meets on Sunday afternoons from 1:30 to 4:30 p.m. Our aim is to make this incredible game more accessible for everyone. events.title: Family Movie - Bad Guys 2
events.description: Bring some snacks, pillows, and blankets, and watch a family-friendly film in the library’s second-floor Youth Program Space. Today’s film is Bad Guys 2 ©Universal Pictures (Rated PG) (Runtime 104 minutes). Thanks to the Friends of the Round Rock Public Library for purchasing the movie license that allows us to share this film with you.

events.title: Toddlertime
events.description: is a storytime activity for children ages 18 months – 3 years old featuring a mix of stories, songs, playful activities, and creative movement. Older and younger siblings are welcome. The regular Toddlertime schedule is: 9:30 a.m. Tuesdays 9:30 a.m. Wednesdays 10:30 a.m. Wednesdays Join us in the first-floor meeting room at Round Rock Public Library .

events.title: Preschool Mandarin Bilingual Storytime
events.description: Mandarin Bilingual Storytime is a mix of stories, songs, and rhymes in Mandarin and English. This program is best enjoyed by children ages 3 - 6, alongside their caregivers. Older and younger siblings are welcome. Join us in the 2nd floor Youth Program Space at Round Rock Public Library .
